mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, base_url as baseUrl, api_key_encrypted as apiKeyEncrypted, is_default as isDefault, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, max_context_tokens as maxContextTokens, params from zephyr_model_configs where user_name = #{userName} order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_model_configs (id, user_name, name, base_url, api_key_encrypted, max_context_tokens, params, is_default, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{userName}, #{name}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKeyEncrypted}, #{maxContextTokens}, #{params}, #{isDefault}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from zephyr_model_configs where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, name, base_url as baseUrl, api_key_encrypted as apiKeyEncrypted, is_default as isDefault, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, max_context_tokens as maxContextTokens, params from zephyr_model_configs where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update zephyr_model_configs set is_default = 0 where user_name = #{userName}
update zephyr_model_configs set is_default = 1 where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
